articles.title: Online age checks are coming in Europe - politico.eu
articles.description: European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen says the world’s biggest tech platforms have “no more excuses” for not checking users’ ages before letting them access restricted content.
articles.content:
Von der Leyens announcement although technical is indicative of the huge momentum behind social media bans to keep kids and teenagers away from platforms and their addictive algorithms.
